content.text:
Based on the zoomed view, I can clearly identify atom C:46 and all its covalently bonded neighbors. Here are the results:

## Neighbor Atoms of Atom 46 (C):

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 44 | N |
| 45 | C |
| 48 | C |
| 57 | H |

**geomconf_index:** 3857

Atom 46 (carbon) has four neighbors: one nitrogen atom (N:44), two carbon atoms (C:45 and C:48), and one hydrogen atom (H:57). The carbon appears to be sp³ hybridized based on the tetrahedral geometry visible in the structure.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 46, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
